EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IPointCollection4

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Provides access to members that manipulate the points of a Multipoint, Path, Ring, Polyline, Polygon, TriangleFan, TriangleStrip, or MultiPatch.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("773F7279-AEFB-11D5-8112-00C04FA0ADF8")]
public interface IPointCollection4 : IPointCollection3, IPointCollection2, IPointCollection
